name: Diamondframe
description: Open diamond outlines, a rotated windowpane that re-tints rather than fills on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 100% 50%, 50% 100%, 0 50%); clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 100% 50%, 50% 100%, 0 50%); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: var(--color0); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 18%, 82% 50%, 50% 82%, 18% 50%); clip-path: polygon(50% 18%, 82% 50%, 50% 82%, 18% 50%); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
